---
title: "Geyser Demos Gallery"
subtitle: "Explore interactive R Shiny modules powered by WebAssembly (Shinylive)"
toc: false
listing:
  contents:
    - build_module.qmd
    - connect_modules.qmd
    - python_module.qmd
    - posit_gallery.qmd
  type: grid
  categories: false
---

This page showcases different methods of displaying Shiny apps alongside their code, ranging from standard iframe embeds to serverless WebAssembly-powered modular R applications running completely in your browser.
